title: GoopyUtil
description: Utility API meant to be paired with FNAF mods. Can also be used as a mod on its own to bring technical FNAF-themed props to the game.
body:
## CURRENTLY IN BETA

# GoopyUtil is both a FNAF MOD and an API.
This project was created as a way to **bridge the gap between all of the FNAF mods willing to use it**. It was also created as a solid base for them to build their mods off of, with pre-made tools and functionalities that are easy to implement into a separate mod.

## THIS MOD CURRENTLY CONTAINS:
### A Fleshed Out FNAF Style CAMERA System.
A camera system featuring a dynamic map (drawn by the player), a lot of options like night vision, a flashlight, or even a button to trigger redstone, and other cool stuff!

### The Computer
Currently featuring one functioning app, the "Code Editor", used to customize the AI stored on a Floppy Disk.

### Floppy Disks
Comes in pair with the computer, use it to write a custom AI on this item, and use this item on a custom entity to apply it.

### ZEPHYR (My test dummy)
He exists with the only purpose of being a placeholder entity for your classic Freddy 5-Bear. He's a way for me to test the features I work on for this project (including the custom AI system).

### The Layered Block
A solution to the problem of there never being enough blocks for specific needs. Every side of this block can be recolored and be set to up to 3 layered textures.

### The DeathCoin
Does what its name implies, it literally deletes any entity punched using it.

### The BlackList (spooky!!)
Is there a person you don't like? someone that you want to "ban" from using your mod? Well look no further than the Blacklist! just add their name to the list and wazaa, they can't use your mod anymore, ain't that crazy cool?? (if a blacklisting is unfair, it can be appealed on the GoopyUtil discord server.)
